notes: The traditional meaning of 2.38 — the equanimity-doctrine seed; three pairs treated with the same dispositional stance; engagement from that state does not produce bondage — is preserved exactly in the engineering layer. The pairs are NOT collapsed (the verse's same-kṛtvā vs being-the-same distinction is the load-bearing claim). The engineering layer explicitly preserves: 'The pairs themselves are not erased — telemetry still fluctuates, targets still carry numbers, competitors still launch. Erasure would mean refusing observation, refusing measurement, refusing recognition. That is precisely what is NOT being requested.' This is doctrinally clean. The pāpam → bondage rendering (Ramanuja) is preserved; the without-likes-and-dislikes gloss (Shankara) is preserved as 'without the data redefining identity.' No inversion. PASS.
